content:
Gone into lvl50 p-dive with my lvl50 team (tulu, myriam, faros and caecus) (my acc level is 45 btw), and got my ass handed to me after 3 fights (1 elite).

Not sure what's wrong. Do I level up the skills more, swap someone or my acc lvl is too low or P-Dive is just hard. Need advice.

Added all awakeners that I have, but would prefer to play as pure aequor if possible.
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content:
I don’t do much PDive so idk much about the difficulty on there, but what I can tell you is that:

you are building both a Caecus counter team and Faros poison team at the same time and while it could work but have conflicting interests and teammates they want

Faros would probably want Aurita in the Caecus slot to maximize tentacle slaps

Caecus would Murphy in there somewhere probably in the Faros slot

Actually I’m not gonna lie the comp probably works but slotting in Arachne for like Miryam or Tulu would just make either suggestions better because frankly only like Corpossant, GMurphy and maybe Vortice can pull off mono AQ 
-# and even then all three have issues <:Horla_Sendflowers:1468259514091573350>
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content:
pdive is balanced assuming you are using the featured awakeners, who have +50% stats. if you go in with a bunch of randoms, it will be like doing a stage while 10 levels underleveled

you are also using a weak team and substandard builds, you have no R wheels, no gluttony so your max hp is low
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: and theres probably no small amount of skill issue since lv50 pdive is extremely easy
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: for reference, this team clears lv60 pdive
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: taking one turn for every fight and 3 turns on the boss
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content:
ye, I know that counter/poison mix is not ideal
just wanted to use caecus since he became oe by himself
thought he would be good as a defensive unit that also can build a respectable counter by himself

I will try to swap him for murphy (tho I want e1 for her first)
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content:
Miryam had buff, but I think only her
How many chars should I try to take that have buffs? I know that the more the better, but is there like a minimum 2-3 or should I focus on dps having a buff

Got some ssr wheels and r wheels kind of got swapped out. I will bring them back. Thanks
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content:
dps with buffs are more impactful yea

you dont need the buffs to clear, i regularly clear lv60 dive with meme builds, but if you are struggling then looking at what awakeners are buffed will help
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: dont be starstruck by ssr wheels, r wheels are better 99% of the time
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: i am on the leaderboard using mostly r wheels
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: you prob right about skill issue. Although not sure what skill do I need to block hits the size of 60% of my hp bar. Just feels like defense is lacking. Although for a primarily poison team it's hardly an optimal team build, so I will think on that more. Focusing on poison and swapping out tulu and caecus for more defensive options maybe the way to go
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: gluttony helps a lot, you will have 44% more max hp after two fights, and it also scales the size of your white stance shield
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: miryam can also put out weakness and str down
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: in endgame most hits are like 150% of your hp bar lol
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: 60% is nothing
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: ye I read about it in the guide, but still swapped them lol. SSR wheel just look like a super weapons I guess (luxury vibe)
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content:
yes, but with 1 arc rules I need to find it buy/find it first, which can take a few fights first, and I tend to go for caecus rouse first since it feels more defensive.

Plus it felt like I always low on resources (arith/aliem), but some of the R wheels will solve that I think (like the one that gives 1000 keyflare after every battle)
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: yeah the wheel delirium lets you start with the rouse in your opening hand
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: faros can also find it
thread_title: Got mauled in 50lvl p-dive. Need advice

content: i think miryam rouse is more important than caecus rouse, since her exalt also gives the % hp heal

content: and she enables the rest of the team

content: miryam without the rouse is not a character
